scrolls.name: Scroll of Detect Life
scrolls.description: Nearby living creatures, but not undead, machines or daedra, can be seen through walls.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Dragonhide
scrolls.description: Caster ignores 90% of all physical damage for <30> seconds.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Bane of the Undead
Scroll of Call to Arms
scrolls.description: Targets have improved combat skills, health and stamina for <10> minutes.
